cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.0.3.0)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "C:/esp/v6.0.2/esp-idf/tools/cmake;C:/esp/v6.0.2/esp-idf/tools/cmake/third_party")
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE C)
set_property(DIRECTORY PROPERTY INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "")
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "@\"C:/Users/topvpc056/Downloads/remote_control/Tai lieu/taycam/remote_control/build/toolchain/cflags\"")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "-g")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "@\"C:/Users/topvpc056/Downloads/remote_control/Tai lieu/taycam/remote_control/build/toolchain/ldflags\"")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
add_definitions([==[-v]==])
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0155 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0157 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0181 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "C:/Users/topvpc056/Downloads/remote_control/Tai lieu/taycam/remote_control/build/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-1ryc2u")
add_executable(cmTC_58c7c)
target_sources(cmTC_58c7c PRIVATE
  "C:/Espressif/tools/cmake/4.0.3/share/cmake-4.0/Modules/CMakeCCompilerABI.c"
)
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cmTC_58c7c_loc"
     CONTENT $<TARGET_FILE:cmTC_58c7c>)
target_link_libraries(cmTC_58c7c ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
